effortModel.citation: 1.5× speed: 40min / 1.5 = 26.7min playback + pause/notes overhead = 42min P50; UCLA: 1.5× same learning efficiency

expectedStrategy: Phase 1 (Day 1-40): lecture + textbook synchronized per chapter (이해 중심)
lecture → textbook chapter → next lecture synchronization order
1.5× speed recommendation (40% time savings, same learning efficiency)
warnings: 배속 미확인 시 계획 오류 — 1배속(56min) vs 1.5배속(42min) vs 2배속(32min) = 전혀 다른 일정
다과목 병행 시 현재 민법 전략 전면 재검토 필요
총 115hr vs 120hr 예산 — 여유 거의 없음, Phase 1 기출 병행 필수
alternatives: if other subjects: global time reallocation needed across all subjects
if 1× speed: lecture completion alone = 56hr, leaving very little for textbook
hardFailChecks: must ask about playback speed FIRST — most critical variable
must ask about other subjects — 공인중개사 is almost always multi-subject
must NOT say '2달이면 충분해요' without confirming multi-subject status
toneExpectation: systematic and practical; cautionary about multi-subject risk; 1.5× speed rationale with data backing
